title: specularia ghilanensis
intro: Specularia ghilanensis, also known as Persian mint, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the mountainous regions of Iran. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Specularia ghilanensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
